name: Robust Generic Copy
description: A reliable way to copy all files and folders, perfect for everyday backups.

name: Mirror Sync
description: Makes the destination folder exactly match the source folder by copying new files and deleting old ones.

name: Safe Backup
description: Copies all files, folders, and security settings safely to a new location.

name: Large File Network
description: Optimized for moving very large files across a network connection without failing.

name: Move Files
description: Moves files to a new location and deletes them from the original source.

name: Throttled Network Copy
description: Copies files slowly so it doesn't slow down your internet or network connection.

name: Background Auto-Sync
description: Runs in the background and automatically copies new files as they change.

name: Recent Files Only (Last 7 Days)
description: Only copies files that have been created or changed in the past week.

name: Backup with Detailed Logging
description: Creates a backup and saves a text file detailing everything that happened.

name: Verify (Report Only)
description: Checks for differences between two folders without actually copying or deleting anything.

name: Exclude Large Files (>100MB)
description: Copies everything except files that are larger than 100 megabytes.

name: Server Migration (Full Security)
description: An advanced copy that keeps all file ownership and security permissions intact.

name: Sync Photos and Videos Only
description: Only copies image and video files, ignoring documents and system files.
